description: DASH-SYNTH-001: Test vectors for Omnipod DASH X25519 key exchange

protocol.description: Omnipod DASH pairing uses X25519 ECDH key exchange with AES-CMAC for key derivation
protocol.key_derivation: AES-CMAC with magic strings for intermediate key, LTK, and confirmation values

vectors.name: OmniBLE Test Vector - Full Key Exchange

intermediate_values.first_key_input: last 4 bytes of: pod_public || pdm_public || pod_nonce || pdm_nonce

vectors.notes: Uses mock fixed private key and nonce generators for deterministic testing

python_compat.description: Python key exchange implementation using cryptography library
python_compat.code:
from cryptography.hazmat.primitives.asymmetric.x25519 import X25519PrivateKey, X25519PublicKey
from cryptography.hazmat.primitives.cmac import CMAC
from cryptography.hazmat.primitives.ciphers import algorithms

def compute_pdm_public(pdm_private_hex: str) -> str:
    private_bytes = bytes.fromhex(pdm_private_hex)
    private_key = X25519PrivateKey.from_private_bytes(private_bytes)
    return private_key.public_key().public_bytes_raw().hex()

def compute_shared_secret(pdm_private_hex: str, pod_public_hex: str) -> bytes:
    private_bytes = bytes.fromhex(pdm_private_hex)
    public_bytes = bytes.fromhex(pod_public_hex)
    private_key = X25519PrivateKey.from_private_bytes(private_bytes)
    public_key = X25519PublicKey.from_public_bytes(public_bytes)
    return private_key.exchange(public_key)

def aes_cmac(key: bytes, data: bytes) -> bytes:
    c = CMAC(algorithms.AES(key))
    c.update(data)
    return c.finalize()

def derive_keys(pdm_private_hex: str, pdm_nonce_hex: str, pod_public_hex: str, pod_nonce_hex: str) -> dict:
    pdm_private = bytes.fromhex(pdm_private_hex)
    pdm_nonce = bytes.fromhex(pdm_nonce_hex)
    pod_public = bytes.fromhex(pod_public_hex)
    pod_nonce = bytes.fromhex(pod_nonce_hex)
    
    # Compute PDM public key
    private_key = X25519PrivateKey.from_private_bytes(pdm_private)
    pdm_public = private_key.public_key().public_bytes_raw()
    
    # Compute shared secret (curve LTK)
    public_key = X25519PublicKey.from_public_bytes(pod_public)
    curve_ltk = private_key.exchange(public_key)
    
    # First key: last 4 bytes of each
    first_key = pod_public[-4:] + pdm_public[-4:] + pod_nonce[-4:] + pdm_nonce[-4:]
    intermediate_key = aes_cmac(first_key, curve_ltk)
    
    MAGIC = b'TWIt'
    
    # LTK derivation
    ltk_data = bytes([0x02]) + MAGIC + pod_nonce + pdm_nonce + bytes([0x00, 0x01])
    ltk = aes_cmac(intermediate_key, ltk_data)
    
    # Confirmation key
    conf_data = bytes([0x01]) + MAGIC + pod_nonce + pdm_nonce + bytes([0x00, 0x01])
    conf_key = aes_cmac(intermediate_key, conf_data)
    
    # PDM conf
    pdm_conf_data = b'KC_2_U' + pdm_nonce + pod_nonce
    pdm_conf = aes_cmac(conf_key, pdm_conf_data)
    
    # Pod conf
    pod_conf_data = b'KC_2_V' + pod_nonce + pdm_nonce
    pod_conf = aes_cmac(conf_key, pod_conf_data)
    
    return {
        'pdm_public': pdm_public.hex(),
        'ltk': ltk.hex(),
        'pdm_conf': pdm_conf.hex(),
        'pod_conf': pod_conf.hex()
    }
